title: Set up WebSocket real-time with Socket.io in Next.js
summary: Integrate Socket.io into a Next.js project using a custom Node.js server — covers server setup, client hooks, rooms, broadcasting, and authentication.
declaration: I will integrate Socket.io into this Next.js project using a custom Node.js server. This enables real-time bidirectional communication (chat, notifications, live cursors, etc.). Next.js does not support WebSocket natively in Route Handlers — a custom server is required. If you want a hosted real-time service (Pusher, Ably, Liveblocks) instead, say so before I begin.
